chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4051 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.17506/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 Mr. Hasan Khursheed Hashmi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Samad, advocate for respondent No.2/FUUAST. Ms. Wajeeha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. ------------- The petitioner has made two applications dated 31.08.2021 and 09.06.2022 to the Vice Chancellor of Federal Urdu University of Arts, Science & Technology (FUUAST) for promotion to BPS-21, however, respondent No.2 Vice Chancellor FUUAST has not passed any order on the same. Learned counsel for the petitioner would be satisfied if respondent No.2 Vice Chancellor FUUAST is directed to decide the petitioner’s aforesaid two applications within two months of the date of this order after giving the petitioner an opportunity of personal hearing and by way of a speaking order. Learned counsel for respondent No.2 FUUAST and learned Assistant Attorney General have no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to Vice Chancellor FUUAST for compliance. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
